name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 22 Jan 2021
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this special release update, we bring you the spruced-up Account Details section. Explore the modernized look and experience the comfort of managing your account information; we would love to know what you think!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Revamped Account Details","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We simplified how you access and manage your account information. As before, the Account Details page is available in the drop-down list when you click your user name in the top-right corner of the application."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AccountDetailsNav.0685g000006w7zLAAQ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AccountDetailsNav.0685g000006w7zLAAQ.png","name":"Account_Details_Nav","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":888,"width":690}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The page now consists of account-related information and tasks neatly grouped into specific tabs:"}]}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"PROFILE – Update your profile information, login information, and profile-specific preferences. To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Managing-Your-Profile","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Managing Your Profile"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"ACCOUNT – Update your account details and settings. To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Managing-Your-Accounts","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Managing Your Accounts"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"USERS – Manage your account users and their privileges. To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Managing-Users-and-Their-Privileges","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Managing Users and Their Privileges"}]},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AccountDetails.0685g000006w7zKAAQ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AccountDetails.0685g000006w7zKAAQ.png","name":"Account_Details","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2078,"width":3036}}]}]
